channel.title: Comments on: 2009 Craft Beer Picks, Ep. 88
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Sean
item.dc:creator: Sean
item.description:
Shall we call it Belgian 2009? Come one guys - what about the variety :)
Thanks for a great year of videos!!
Sean 2Beerguys.com
item.content:encoded:
Shall we call it Belgian 2009? Come one guys – what about the variety 🙂

Thanks for a great year of videos!!

Sean
2Beerguys.com

item.title: By: Web Brewmaster
item.dc:creator: Web Brewmaster
item.description: I'm with Frank. Monk's Revenge is a keeper. Hope the good folks at Terrapin are watching.
item.content:encoded: I’m with Frank. Monk’s Revenge is a keeper. Hope the good folks at Terrapin are watching.

item.title: By: Marco Baio
item.dc:creator: Marco Baio
item.description:
Great show. I agree with Grant, please keep the shows coming! I haven't missed one yet. I always anticipate the email coming with a new episode waiting to be seen.
HAPPY NEW YEAR!!!
Cheers, Marco
item.content:encoded:
Great show. I agree with Grant, please keep the shows coming! I haven’t missed one yet. I always anticipate the email coming with a new episode waiting to be seen.

HAPPY NEW YEAR!!!

Cheers,
Marco

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: If I were to choose between the 3 you picked I would select the Terripin. All 3 are good picks. Thanks for the reviews.Happy New Years.
item.content:encoded: If I were to choose between the 3 you picked I would select the Terripin. All 3 are good picks. Thanks for the reviews.Happy New Years.

item.title: By: Grant Levy
item.dc:creator: Grant Levy
item.description:
Great episodes, guys! I appreciate your descriptions of these interesting beers (many of which I seek out). Please keep those videos coming!
I have a tie for my favorite beer this year between Southern Tier's Crème Brûlée Imperial Stout and Terrapin's Depth Charge. Both bring a ton of flavor and aroma.
item.content:encoded:
Great episodes, guys! I appreciate your descriptions of these interesting beers (many of which I seek out). Please keep those videos coming!

I have a tie for my favorite beer this year between Southern Tier’s Crème Brûlée Imperial Stout and Terrapin’s Depth Charge. Both bring a ton of flavor and aroma.
